sub_modules.highpass_fir_input_cast: Combinational signed interpretation of the DATA_W input sample.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_tap_update: Combinational next-state generator for the FIR delay line with implicit zero-extension from reset.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Combinational 101-tap signed FIR multiply-accumulate using the required hard-coded Q15 high-pass coefficients.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_q15_shift: Combinational arithmetic Q15 normalization from the 64-bit accumulator to the output width.
